_note: Seed data for the RentalItems CMS collection. To import: Wix Dashboard → CMS → RentalItems → Import, or paste each item via the admin dashboard page. All 8 categories are represented across 15 items.

items.name: Gold Geometric Arch
items.description: A stunning hexagonal gold-frame arch — perfect as a ceremony backdrop or photo opportunity focal point. 8ft tall × 6ft wide.

items.name: Ivory Silk Backdrop Panel
items.description: Floor-length sheer ivory silk panel, 10ft × 8ft. Ideal for head-table backdrops, ceremony walls, or photo stations.

items.name: White Floral Balloon Arch
items.description: Lush organic balloon arch in blush, ivory, and sage — a Dallas bridal shower and quinceañera favorite. Approx. 10ft wide.

items.name: Ivory Chiffon Draping Panel
items.description: Sheer ivory chiffon panels for ceiling draping, photo backdrops, or elegant chair sashes. Sold per panel (approx. 10ft).

items.name: Champagne Satin Table Runner
items.description: Luxurious champagne satin runner, fits 6ft and 8ft banquet tables. Adds warmth and elegance to any tablescape.

items.name: White Floor-Length Tablecloth
items.description: Crisp white floor-length tablecloth for standard 60" round or 8ft banquet tables. Wrinkle-resistant polyester.

items.name: Crystal Candelabra Centerpiece
items.description: Tall 5-arm crystal candelabra (32" height) — holds taper or pillar candles for dramatic, romantic table settings.

items.name: Gold Geometric Vase
items.description: Modern geometric gold metal vase, 12" tall. Pairs beautifully with fresh, faux, or dried florals.

items.name: Pearl Floral Pedestal Stand
items.description: Elegant white-and-gold pedestal stand (36" tall) for floral arrangements, wedding cakes, or decorative displays.

items.name: Mirror Charger Plates (set of 10)
items.description: Glamorous mirror-finish charger plates, 13" diameter. Sold in sets of 10 — transforms any place setting instantly.

items.name: Gold-Rimmed Charger Plates (set of 10)
items.description: Classic white charger plates with a brushed 24K gold rim, 13" diameter. Set of 10. Clean, timeless elegance.

items.name: Edison String Lights (20ft strand)
items.description: Warm-glow Edison bulb string lights, 20ft with 20 vintage bulbs. Perfect for canopy, pergola, or perimeter lighting.

items.name: Warm Uplighting Set (4 units)
items.description: Set of 4 wireless LED uplights in warm white or amber. Battery-powered — no cables needed. Transforms any venue wall.

items.name: Eucalyptus & Rose Garland (per 6ft)
items.description: Lush faux eucalyptus and blush rose garland, 6ft length. Ideal for table runners, mantels, or arch accents.

items.name: Boxwood Hedge Panel
items.description: Realistic faux boxwood hedge panel, 4ft × 4ft. Popular backdrop for photo booths, bars, and lounge areas.
